inputs.text: A stunning Korean idol-style woman caught in a surprised candid moment on a snow-covered street at night, mouth slightly open, eyes wide with delight as snowflakes drift around her. Subtle auburn tint fluffy wolf cut tousled by winter breeze. Delicate features, button nose, flawless porcelain skin with glossy dewy makeup, shimmering highlighter on cheekbones. Wearing a retro 90s oversized denim jacket with fleece collar, high-waisted mom jeans, chunky platform boots. Wide environmental portrait, small in frame against the glowing amber streetlights and fresh white snow. Shot on 85mm f/1.4, creamy bokeh transforming distant lights into golden orbs. High angle looking down, cross lighting from two sides creating dramatic shadows. Ethereal winter atmosphere, cinematic mood.
text, watermark, logo, extra fingers, deformed hands
